HGSS.113.0000:
Oh, man... My boss is going to be
angry...\f
The FARFETCH’D that cut trees for
charcoal took off in the forest.\f
Can you catch them for me?
FARFETCH’D have sensitive ears.\f
If you step on a branch, they will face
toward you. That’s your chance.\f
Sneak up from behind and catch them...
Do you think you can do that?
HGSS.113.0001:
Wow! You found a FARFETCH’D!
Thank you!\f
But...
There is one more missing.\f
If you step on a branch, it will face
that way, remember?\f
That’s your chance to catch it.
Sneak up on it slowly from behind.
HGSS.113.0002:
Wow!
You got me both of them.\r
Thank you so much!\f
My boss’s Pokémon won’t obey me,
because I don’t have a Badge.\f
Phew. You saved me.
HGSS.113.0006:
Ah!
My Far and Fetch’d!\f
You found them for us, kid?
Without them, we wouldn’t be able to\r
cut trees for charcoal.\f
Thanks, kid!\f
Now, how can I thank you...?
I know! Here, take this.\f
HGSS.113.0008:
That’s the HM Cut. Teach that to a
Pokémon to clear small trees.\f
Of course, you have to have the Gym
Badge from Azalea to use it.
HGSS.113.0010:
Do you want to apprentice as a charcoal
maker with me?\f
You’ll be first-rate in ten years!
HGSS.113.0011:
What am I doing?\f
I’m shaking trees using Headbutt.\f
It’s fun. Here, you try it with your
Pokémon, too! [0200,0000]
HGSS.113.0012:
Do you want to try it with your
Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.113.0013:
I see...
Take care of its head.
HGSS.113.0015:
Hmmm...
Even I couldn’t teach an Egg a move.\f
HGSS.113.0016:
Sorry...
That Pokémon cannot learn Headbutt.\f
HGSS.113.0017:
[0101,0000,0000] is trying to learn
Headbutt.\f
But [0101,0000,0000] can’t learn more
than four moves.\f
Delete an older move to make
room for Headbutt? [0200,0000]
HGSS.113.0018:
Is it OK to forget the
move [0106,0001,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.113.0022:
There. How do you like it?
Your [0100,0000,0000] looks stronger!
HGSS.113.0027:
Trainer Tips!\f
Ilex Forest is so overgrown with trees
that you can’t see the sky.\f
Please watch out for items that may
have been dropped.
HGSS.113.0028:
Ilex Forest Shrine...\f
It’s a tribute to the forest’s
protector...
HGSS.113.0029:
Kimono Girl, Kimono Girl, lost and all
alone. Poor girl lost in the dark\r
Ilex Forest.\f
HGSS.113.0030:
What?
You remember me from Violet City?\r
You must be imagining.\f
Anyway, will you show me
how to get out of this forest? [0200,0000]
HGSS.113.0031:
You will...?
Aren’t you lost in the forest as well?\r
How do you know how to get out of here?\f
HGSS.113.0032:
Me oh my...
You are lost yourself, aren’t you?\f
HGSS.113.0033:
Wow! Are you going to
show me how to get out?\r
You are such a smart Pokémon!\f
HGSS.113.0035:
FARFETCH’D noticed you!
It seems to face the direction of the\r
noise when you step on a branch.
HGSS.113.0036: You need to catch it from behind.
HGSS.113.0037:
You snuck up and caught it from
behind before it noticed you!
HGSS.113.0038:
It’s a PICHU...!
One of its ears is spiky!\f
HGSS.113.0039:
It wants to join your party.
Let it join you!\f
HGSS.113.0040:
Spiky-eared PICHU has joined
your party!
HGSS.113.0042:
...Your party is full!\f
First go store a Pokémon in a PC Box.
HGSS.113.0045:
Would you like to give a nickname
to the Spiky-eared PICHU? [0200,0000]
HGSS.113.0046:
Hey, hey!
You should not tamper with that shrine!\r
People are said to disappear.\f
HGSS.113.0047:
Kids and Pokémon sometimes disappear
around this shrine.\f
It is believed that a Pokémon which
wanders across time does that.\f
It is truly a strange thing...\f
HGSS.113.0048:
Well, well, this must be...\f
This must be the PICHU that has lived in
this forest for some time.\f
When I saw it the first time, it looked
lonely. It is full of energy today.\f
HGSS.113.0049:
I see.
It seems that these old friends\r
finally meet again after a long time.\f
HGSS.113.0050:
You are carrying a lot of Pokémon.\f
Why don’t you store one of them
at the Pokémon Center?\r
I will take care of it in the mean time.
HGSS.113.0051:
Being with friends should make it happy.
Take good care of it.\f
HGSS.113.0052:
Oh, here it is!
Young Pokémon Trainer,\r
I will give you this Poké Ball.\f
I used to use them when I was younger.\f
Don’t worry.
It’s still in good condition.\f
HGSS.113.0053:
It seems that Spiky-eared PICHU
wants to stay in your Poké Ball.\f
HGSS.113.0054:
You named it [0101,0000,0000]?
Such a cute name!\f
HGSS.113.0055:
It’s been waiting for you
all this time.\f
Talk to it. That’ll make it happy.
HGSS.113.0056:
Ethan: Hi, [0103,0000,0000].
Have you heard of the legend of\r
the shrine?\f
They say that people disappear when
they tamper with it.\f
HGSS.113.0057:
Lyra: Hi, [0103,0000,0000].
Have you heard of the legend of\r
the shrine?\f
They say that people disappear when
they tamper with it.\f
HGSS.113.0060:
Ethan: Traveling through time
sure doesn’t feel good.\f
HGSS.113.0061:
Lyra: Traveling through time
sure doesn’t feel good.\f
HGSS.113.0064:
I thought I would never see you again!\f
Wait a sec...
So we must be back to our time!\f
HGSS.113.0065:
I missed you so much!\f
Wait a sec...
So we must be back to our time!\f
HGSS.113.0066:
It was all so bizarre.
But now that we are safely back to our\r
time and Team Rocket’s terrible design\r
fell through, we can say...\r
all’s well that ends well, right?\f
[0103,0000,0000], you never cease to
inspire great adventures!\f
It sure was an exhausting day, though.
I better get going.\f
See you!\f
HGSS.113.0067:
It was all so bizarre.
But now that we are safely back to our\r
time and Team Rocket’s terrible design\r
fell through, we can say...\r
all’s well that ends well, right?\f
[0103,0000,0000], you never cease to
inspire great adventures!\f
It sure was an exhausting day, though.
I better get going.\f
See you!\f
